name: skin-cyberpunk
title: Cyberpunk skin
description: Cyberpunk concept skin: neon cyan/magenta glow, clipped angular corners, dark HUD panels. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="cyberpunk"] over unmodified shadcn components.
docs: 1) @import "./skins/cyberpunk.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="cyberpunk" on <html>.
